properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm looking ahead to that glorious city Where I'll shake the hands of those've gone on before me I can still feel the same tender hand that's carrying me, will lead me home so Lord I'm looking ahead

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Living in a world of insanity We're surrounded by the dead, they are all asleep But under the Easter seal thank God we're quickened and awakened Now the master is here the son has risen He's no longer the hidden Messiah but He has appeared Now to the promise of a second coming I'm looking ahead

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So many among us are hurting They're wounded in the battle Lord they are dying Brothers, take each others hand Sisters, do the same thing too Lift each other in prayer, we will make it through And though skin worms may destroy this body I've got another one waiting for me So Lord fill my soul with your Holy Ghost Cleanse me and make me whole

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: (I'm looking ahead…) I am looking to my perfect sacrifice, to my redeemer the Lord Jesus Christ No more sickness no more trials for me To that provided place that Jesus built for me My faith is settled, my theophany To that provided place that Jesus prepared for me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: (I'm looking ahead…) Swing low, swing low, swing low, sweet chariot In just a little while We'll see our Redeemer's face In just a little while we'll shake our prophet's hand In just a little while we'll walk the streets of gold Hallelujah we'll meet the saints of all the ages Ohh we're going home…
